calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: Discovery Bank FKA Greenwood Trust Co.
No appearance by the Defendants: Phan Tan.
Declaration of Robert Adkins, Custodian of Books of record presented to the court
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant(s): Phan Tan as follows:
Principal: $5,968.98
Prejudgment interest: $511.86
Costs: $198.30
Atty fees: $675.00
Total $7,354.14
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2004 Set For Trial On Feb-07-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
